title: Specialization · Speech & Audio (deep dive)
focus: ASR, TTS, audio embeddings, streaming inference.

items.label: Whisper paper — ASR with weak supervision
interviewQuestions: How does Whisper handle multiple languages without a language ID input?
Why does Whisper's weak-supervision data pipeline help generalization?
What's Whisper's failure mode for low-resource languages?

items.label: wav2vec 2.0 — self-supervised audio representations
interviewQuestions: Walk me through wav2vec 2.0's self-supervised pretraining.
When would you use wav2vec features vs raw mel spectrograms?
How do you fine-tune wav2vec for a new language?

items.label: Modern TTS: VITS / Tortoise / ElevenLabs overview
interviewQuestions: Compare VITS, Tortoise, and ElevenLabs at a high level.
What's the trade-off between voice quality and inference latency in TTS?
How would you evaluate TTS quality without humans?

items.label: Mel spectrograms + MFCC features
interviewQuestions: Why are mel spectrograms preferred over raw waveforms for ASR?
What's the difference between MFCCs and mel spectrograms?
How does mel-spectrogram resolution affect downstream models?

items.label: Streaming ASR — chunking + endpointing
interviewQuestions: What's the latency-vs-quality trade-off for streaming ASR vs full-utterance ASR?
How does endpointing work in streaming ASR?
Walk me through chunking strategy for an LLM-based real-time transcriber.

items.label: Design a real-time meeting transcription + summarization system

interviewQuestions: How does Whisper handle multiple languages without a language ID input?
What's the latency-vs-quality trade-off for streaming ASR vs full-utterance ASR?
Walk me through your end-to-end real-time transcription system.
